problems.text: In how many ways can an ant return home to point B from point A? The ant can only move vertically and horizontally.

problems.html:
There are five gift boxes of different sizes. Here is what we know:
• The red box is bigger than the white box.
• The yellow box is bigger than the white box.
• The black box is smaller than the red box.
• The blue box is bigger than the yellow box but smaller than the black box.

Which box is the biggest?
problems.label: Biggest box (color):

problems.text: In how many ways can you form a 3-digit number using 1, 2 and 3, using each digit once?
Is the sum of the first 5 even numbers odd or even?
problems._note: SOURCE WORDING WAS: 'Is the number of first 5 even numbers odd or even?' — reworded to 'sum'; confirm this is the intended question.
